lines.speaker: Mina
lines.text: Hi! Welcome to our town path.

lines.speaker: Mina
lines.text: This room is one story stop.

lines.speaker: Mina
lines.text: That outdoor place is for play.

lines.speaker: Mina
lines.text: Can you help me find my story stop?

lines.speaker: Mina
lines.text: Then Leo will set up the story room.
